norwegian: Hun sa at hun ___ på jobb neste dag.
english: She said that she would be at work the next day.

norwegian: Han fortalte at han ___ veldig trøtt etter jobben.
english: He said that he had been very tired after work.

norwegian: Hun spurte om jeg ___ komme på festen.
english: She asked whether I wanted to come to the party.

norwegian: Han fortalte at han ___ opp i Bergen.
english: He said that he had grown up in Bergen.

norwegian: Hun sa at hun ikke likte regn.
english: She said that she didn't like rain.

norwegian: Han spurte om vi hadde spist middag.
english: He asked whether we had eaten dinner.

norwegian: Læreren sa at elevene måtte lese kapittel tre til neste gang.
english: The teacher said that the students had to read chapter three for next time.

norwegian: Han fortalte at han kjente henne fra universitetet.
english: He said that he knew her from university.

norwegian: Hun sa at hun hadde glemt å kjøpe melk.
english: She said that she had forgotten to buy milk.

norwegian: Han sa at han var sulten.
english: He said that he was hungry

norwegian: Jeg fortalte henne at jeg var lei.
english: I told her that I was tired

norwegian: De spurte om vi hadde penger.
english: They asked if we had money

norwegian: Læreren sa at elevene var flinke.
english: The teacher said that the students were clever

norwegian: Moren fortalte barnet at det var tid for å sove.
english: The mother told the child that it was time to sleep

norwegian: Vennen sa at han hadde vært i Paris.
english: The friend said that he had been to Paris

norwegian: Jeg sa at jeg ikke hadde sett filmen.
english: I said that I had not seen the movie

norwegian: De sa at de kom tilbake i morgen.
english: They said that they would come back tomorrow

norwegian: Han spurte om jeg hadde sett hunden.
english: He asked if I had seen the dog

norwegian: Hun fortalte meg at hun hadde funnet en ny jobb.
english: She told me that she had found a new job

norwegian: Jeg sa at jeg ville møte deg i morgen.
english: I said that I would meet you tomorrow

norwegian: Jeg fortalte henne at jeg gikk hjem.
english: I told her that I went home.

norwegian: Hun sa at hun hadde sett filmen.
english: She said that she had seen the movie.

norwegian: Vennen min sa at han ville komme.
english: My friend said that he would come.

norwegian: Jeg sa at jeg ikke hadde tid.
english: I said that I didn't have time.

norwegian: De fortalte oss at de skulle reise.
english: They told us that they would travel.

norwegian: Han spurte meg om jeg hadde sett boken.
english: He asked me if I had seen the book.

norwegian: Jeg sa at jeg hadde gjort hjemmelekser.
english: I said that I had done my homework.

norwegian: Læreren sa at elevene skulle være stille.
english: The teacher said that the students should be quiet.

norwegian: Hun fortalte meg at hun hadde en hund.
english: She told me that she had a dog.

norwegian: Han sa at han hadde spist frokost.
english: He said that he had eaten breakfast.

norwegian: Læreren spurte oss om vi hadde lest.
english: The teacher asked us if we had read.

norwegian: Naboen fortalte oss at bussen ikke gikk på søndag.
english: The neighbour told us that the bus did not run on Sunday.

norwegian: Kollegaen min sa at møtet begynte klokken ni.
english: My colleague said that the meeting started at nine o'clock.

norwegian: Han spurte om vi ville spise ute i kveld.
english: He asked whether we wanted to eat out tonight.

norwegian: Hun lurte på om jeg hadde sett nøklene hennes.
english: She wondered whether I had seen her keys.

norwegian: Sjefen fortalte oss at vi ikke trengte å komme tidlig.
english: The boss told us that we did not need to come in early.

norwegian: De spurte om restauranten hadde et ledig bord.
english: They asked whether the restaurant had a free table.

norwegian: Jeg fortalte ham at jeg ikke kjente veien til stasjonen.
english: I told him that I did not know the way to the station.

norwegian: Hun ___ om billettene allerede var utsolgt.
english: She asked whether the tickets were already sold out.

norwegian: Kameraten min fortalte meg ___ han hadde bestått eksamen.
english: My friend told me that he had passed the exam.
